certificate_metadata.paper: paper | Bell-Godel Categorical Identity as Theorem.md
certificate_metadata.author: Christian Franchi Viceré

execution_environment.import_strategy: pure core Lean 4 — minimal axioms encoded inline

execution_result.stdout_summary: All four declarations type-checked and elaborated by the kernel.

verified_declarations.name: heyting_neg_no_fixed_point
verified_declarations.type: ∀ {H : Type} (HA : HeytingAlg H) (x : H), HA.himp x HA.bot ≠ x
verified_declarations.natural_language: In any non-trivial Heyting algebra, Heyting negation has no fixed point.

verified_declarations.name: lawvere_set
verified_declarations.type: ∀ {A B : Type} (φ : A → A → B) (f : B → B), (∀ h : A → B, ∃ a₀, h = φ a₀) → ∃ b : B, f b = b
verified_declarations.natural_language: Lawvere's fixed-point theorem in Set: every endomorphism on the codomain has a fixed point when a weakly point-surjective evaluation exists.

verified_declarations.name: lawvere_no_wps
verified_declarations.type: ∀ {A B : Type} (f : B → B) (hf : ∀ b, f b ≠ b), ¬ ∃ φ : A → A → B, ∀ h : A → B, ∃ a₀, h = φ a₀
verified_declarations.natural_language: If f has no fixed point then no weakly point-surjective φ exists.

verified_declarations.name: universal_lawvere_obstruction_set
verified_declarations.type: ∀ {A H : Type} (HA : HeytingAlg H), ¬ ∃ φ : A → A → H, ∀ h : A → H, ∃ a₀, h = φ a₀
verified_declarations.natural_language: The Universal Lawvere Obstruction holds in the Set instance: for any non-trivial Heyting algebra H and any type A, no weakly point-surjective evaluation A → A → H exists.

not_covered_by_this_certificate: Theorem 4.1 parts (b)-(e) in the Bohr topos and arithmetic topos — these require Mathlib4 Topos modules which were not imported (kernel OOM budget) and remain as deductive specializazioni dello Set instance via standard CCC enrichment.
Pathway γ (Heunen–Reyes frame embedding) — dipends on locale theory, separate certificate planned.

reproduction_steps: 2. Save the .lean file to any working directory.
3. Run: lean certificate\ \|\ Bell-Godel\ Lean4\ verification.lean
4. Expect exit code 0 and four #check outputs printing the declaration types.
reproducibility.bridge_protocol_documentation: See companion repository /docs/iot-bridge.md for the HMAC-SHA256 authentication scheme used to invoke the remote Lean kernel.

ip_protection_notice: This certificate exposes only standard mathematical primitives (Heyting algebras, cartesian closed Set, Lawvere 1969). No 𝒰₁₃₇-internal vocabulary (KIST, σ-involution, 8-functor, AntiD, Hurwitz ladder, StellaOct, 𝔎^Stella) is exposed. The certificate is publishable as-is with the paper.
